sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Truist Securities Lowers Price Target for Molina Healthcare (MOH)
feed.summary: Truist Securities has reiterated its "Hold" rating for Molina Healthcare (MOH) but significantly lowered its price target from $190.00 to $145.00. This adjustment follows similar price target reductions by other major financial institutions earlier in February 2026. Despite the lowered targets, the average analyst forecast still implies a 17.00% upside from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a much larger upside based on its calculated GF Value.

feed.title: LakePoint Sports and Coca-Cola Bottling Company United Announce Expansive Five-Year Partnership Renewal Through 2029
feed.summary: LakePoint Sports has renewed its partnership with Coca-Cola Bottling Company United for another five years, extending the collaboration through 2029. This expanded agreement will introduce new beverage equipment, self-service kiosks, and premium product offerings to enhance the guest experience at the LakePoint campus. The partnership reinforces Coca-Cola United's commitment to youth sports and community experiences, leveraging LakePoint's role as a national hub for travel and youth sports events.

feed.title: AM Best revises outlook to positive for State Street captive Federated Underwriting Company
feed.summary: AM Best has revised the outlook for Federated Underwriting Company, State Street Corporation's single-parent captive, from stable to positive, while affirming its "A-" (Excellent) Financial Strength Rating and Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating. This positive revision reflects AM Best's expectation of continued solid operating performance and close alignment with its parent company. Federated was established in 2019 to manage specific risks for State Street, benefiting from a very strong balance sheet, adequate operating performance, and appropriate enterprise risk management.

feed.title: BNY Mellon reshuffles managers on trio of municipal bond funds
feed.summary: BNY Mellon Investment Adviser, Inc. announced changes to the portfolio management teams for three of its municipal bond closed-end funds: BNY Mellon Strategic Municipal Bond Fund, Inc., BNY Mellon Strategic Municipals, Inc., and BNY Mellon Municipal Bond Infrastructure Fund, Inc. Effective February 17, 2026, Daniel Rabasco will no longer be a portfolio manager for these funds, while Jeffrey Burger will continue in his role. Thomas Casey has been added as a portfolio manager for BNY Mellon Strategic Municipal Bond Fund, Inc. and BNY Mellon Strategic Municipals, Inc., in addition to his existing role for BNY Mellon Municipal Bond Infrastructure Fund, Inc.

feed.title: Ocular claims a win with Phase 3 eye drug data even as shares sink
feed.summary: Ocular Therapeutix announced positive Phase 3 trial results for its experimental eye disease drug, Axpaxli, showing it outperformed a low dose of Eylea in treating wet age-related macular degeneration. Despite the company's claim of a successful trial, Ocular's shares dropped by 23% as analysts noted the benefits were modest and the high success rate in the Eylea control arm disappointed investors. Ocular plans to seek FDA approval, entering a competitive market currently dominated by Eylea and Vabysmo.

feed.title: Medtronic Announces FDA approval of Infuse™ bone graft for one-and-two level Transforaminal Lumbar Interbody Fusion (TLIF) spine procedures
feed.summary: Medtronic has received FDA Premarket Approval for its INFUSE™ Bone Graft for use in one- and two-level Transforaminal Lumbar Interbody Fusion (TLIF) procedures between L2–S1. This approval makes INFUSE™ the only PMA-approved growth factor bone graft for ALIF, OLIF, and TLIF, including two-level constructs for TLIF. The decision was based on strong clinical evidence from a prospective, multicenter, randomized controlled study that showed fusion rates exceeding 90% in single-level TLIF and comparable results in two-level constructs.

feed.title: Capital One’s commercial bank zeroes in on middle market
feed.summary: Capital One's commercial bank is specifically targeting the middle market, which it views as underserved by larger banks that often shift focus to bigger corporations when lending activity increases. Neal Blinde, head of Capital One’s commercial bank, emphasized their consistent dedication to this segment, despite competition from regional banks. The recent acquisition of Brex is expected to significantly enhance Capital One's commercial payments capabilities, strengthening its offering to middle-market clients.

feed.title: Par Petroleum (PARR) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
feed.summary: Par Petroleum (PARR) is expected to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and lower revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. The company has a Zacks Earnings ESP of +1.25% and a Zacks Rank #3, suggesting it is likely to beat the consensus EPS estimate of $1.21 per share. Investors should consider the Zacks Earnings ESP and Rank before the earnings release on February 24.

feed.title: Henry Schein (HSIC) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Henry Schein (HSIC) is expected to report increased earnings and revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. While analysts project a 9.2% year-over-year EPS growth to $1.30 per share and revenues of $3.33 billion, the company's Zacks Earnings ESP of -0.77% combined with a Zacks Rank #3 makes it difficult to definitively predict an earnings beat. Despite a positive surprise history in past quarters, investors are advised to consider other factors beyond just earnings expectations.

feed.title: CoStar Group (CSGP) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) is expected to report earnings next week, with Wall Street anticipating a year-over-year increase in earnings and revenue for the quarter ended December 2025. Despite a projected earnings growth of 3.9% and revenue increase of 25.6%, CoStar's Zacks Earnings ESP is negative at -4.59% coupled with a Zacks Rank #5, making an earnings beat difficult to predict. The company has, however, consistently beaten EPS estimates in the last four quarters.

feed.title: LMT, NOC, RTX: U.S. Contractors Eye Canada’s New $6.6 Billion Defense Strategy
feed.summary: Canada has announced a new $6.6 billion defense strategy aimed at bolstering its military, supporting Canadian businesses, and creating 125,000 jobs. This initiative is drawing significant interest from major U.S. defense contractors like Lockheed Martin (LMT), Northrop Grumman (NOC), and RTX Corp. (RTX), who have historically supplied Canada with military equipment. While Canada seeks to reduce its reliance on the U.S., its small domestic defense industry likely means U.S. contractors will secure large contracts, possibly with stipulations to invest within Canada and generate local employment.

feed.title: Softbank Group dissolves share stake in Nvidia, according to SEC filing
feed.summary: Softbank Group Corp. dissolved its stake in Nvidia during the fourth quarter of 2025, according to its 13-F filing with the U.S. Securities & Exchange Commission. Following this news, Nvidia's stock price experienced a drop of up to 1.6%, trading at $179.88, which reflects the market's reaction to the disclosure of institutional investor position changes. These quarterly filings provide a snapshot of holdings at a specific date, not real-time changes.

feed.title: Citizens Financial To Acquire Matrix Capital Markets Group
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group Inc. announced its acquisition of Matrix Capital Markets Group Inc., a move that will strengthen Citizens' sector-focused advisory capabilities. Matrix, known for advising convenience retailers and fuel distributors, will operate as a division of Citizens JMP Securities upon closing, which is expected in the first quarter of 2026. The transaction, funded with cash, will integrate Matrix's extensive M&A transaction experience with Citizens' banking platform.

feed.title: Scott Mezvinsky Sells 1,612 Shares of Yum! Brands (NYSE:YUM) Stock
feed.summary: Yum! Brands CEO Scott Mezvinsky sold 1,612 shares on February 13th for approximately $265,384, following a previous sale in December. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.75 per share and reported quarterly earnings, missing EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations. Analysts generally rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $174.00.

feed.title: Magnificent 7 stocks are down for 2 reasons in 2026. The second reason is outside their control
feed.summary: The "Magnificent 7" tech stocks (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, and Tesla) are all experiencing a decline in early 2026, collectively pulling down the Nasdaq. Two primary reasons are cited, with one being within their control (capex spending on AI) and another outside their control (not yet specified in the provided text). This trend raises questions about AI spending and market risk.

feed.title: Could Your Future Tractor Run on Corn? John Deere Thinks So
feed.summary: John Deere is actively testing a 350-HP E98 ethanol tractor across the Midwest, with early trials showing promise for a cleaner, farmer-grown fuel alternative. While challenges like infrastructure and cold-weather starting exist, top executives and testing farmers believe E98 ethanol could enable a more circular production system where farmers grow their own fuel. The technology aims to eliminate the need for diesel exhaust fluid and create increased demand for corn.

feed.title: Gilead to Present New HIV Treatment and Prevention Data at CROI 2026, With a Focus on Expanding Options
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences will present new clinical and real-world data on its HIV treatment and prevention portfolio at CROI 2026. Key presentations include Phase 3 results for an investigational single-tablet combination of bictegravir and lenacapavir for HIV treatment, and further data from the PURPOSE program on twice-yearly lenacapavir for HIV prevention. The company also highlights its ongoing research into long-acting HIV therapies and efforts towards finding an HIV cure.

feed.title: What AvalonBay Communities (AVB)'s 2025 Results, Capital Returns and 2026 Guidance Update Mean For Shareholders
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities (AVB) recently reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 results, showing increased sales and revenue but reduced net income and EPS. The company also announced new 2026 EPS guidance, completed a share repurchase, and increased its quarterly dividend. These actions emphasize AvalonBay's commitment to returning capital to shareholders, though investors will eye the 2026 guidance against ongoing regulatory and development risks in its core markets.

feed.title: Meridian Hedged Equity Fund Maintains Confidence in Vistra Corp. (VST)
feed.summary: Meridian Hedged Equity Fund, managed by ArrowMark Partners, released its Q4 2025 investor letter, noting Vistra Corp. (VST) as a major performance detractor despite the fund's continued confidence. The fund believes Vistra is well-positioned to benefit from surging electricity demand due to data centers and electrification trends, thanks to its balanced portfolio of nuclear, natural gas, and renewable assets. Vistra Corp. closed at $171.49 per share on February 13, 2026, with a market capitalization of $58.105 billion, and is held by 112 hedge funds according to Insider Monkey's database.

feed.title: Analysts Estimate EOG Resources (EOG) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
feed.summary: Analysts expect EOG Resources (EOG) to report a year-over-year decline in earnings despite higher revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. The company is projected to post quarterly earnings of $2.20 per share, a 19.7% decrease, on revenues of $5.8 billion, up 3.9%. With a Zacks Rank of #4 and a negative Earnings ESP of -1.53%, the article suggests it's difficult to predict an earnings beat for EOG, while an industry peer, Diamondback Energy (FANG), shows a stronger likelihood of beating estimates.

feed.title: Boston Scientific’s OPTION-EMEA Trial Targets One-Stop AF and Stroke Protection
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (BSX) is conducting the OPTION-EMEA clinical trial to assess the real-world outcomes of a combined procedure for patients with atrial fibrillation (AF) using their FARAPULSE PFA System and WATCHMAN FLX Pro or WATCHMAN FLX devices. This single-arm study aims to evaluate the practicality and safety of performing both AF treatment and stroke risk reduction in one visit. While the trial is still in the setup phase, successful outcomes could strengthen Boston Scientific's market position and potentially lead to increased adoption and revenue.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Rafael Carrasco Sells Shares of Waste Management I
feed.summary: Rafael Carrasco, Senior Vice President of Enterprise Strategy at Waste Management Inc (WM), sold 7,352 shares of the company on February 13, 2026, and now owns 15,539.742 shares. Over the past year, Carrasco has sold 12,965 shares and made no purchases. Waste Management Inc is currently deemed Fairly Valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.98.

feed.title: Rail News - CSX upgrades locomotive tech to cut fuel use, emissions. For Railroad Career Professionals
feed.summary: CSX has enhanced its locomotive fleet with an upgraded Automatic Engine Start-Stop (AESS) system, aimed at cutting fuel consumption, emissions, and operational costs. Developed in collaboration with Wabtec Corp., the technology automatically shuts down engines when not in use and restarts them as needed. These improvements, building on the 2024 AESS Assist system, also extend locomotive battery life and allow longer shutdown times without idling.

feed.title: Folgers Makes ‘Wakin' Up’ an All-Day Affair
feed.summary: Folgers has launched a new campaign, led by BBH USA and PSOne, that redefines its iconic "The Best Part of Wakin' Up..." jingle. The campaign transforms the jingle into a seven-song mashup, blending it with famous "wake up" songs across various genres to appeal to a new generation and highlight coffee consumption throughout the day. This initiative aims to expand the brand's relevance beyond just morning coffee and create cultural impact.

feed.title: CAD: Softer CPI boosts BoC easing flexibility – RBC
feed.summary: Canadian CPI slowed in January, with headline inflation at 2.3% and ex-tax measures at 2.1%. The Bank of Canada’s core trim and median metrics eased to an average of 2.5%, providing policymakers with more flexibility to cut rates if needed. However, RBC's base case does not assume further rate reductions despite ongoing high grocery and services prices.

feed.title: Keysight launches 3D interconnect designer for chiplet applications
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) has introduced a new Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tool, 3D Interconnect Designer, to address the complex design challenges of chiplet and 3DIC advanced packages used in AI and data centers. The software streamlines the design and optimization of 3D interconnects, accelerating design cycles and reducing compliance risks for emerging industry standards. This launch adds to Keysight's expanding product portfolio, following recent introductions of test solutions for EV charging, wireless coexistence, and collaborations for next-generation interconnects and satellite networks.

feed.title: Atlanta-based Fortune 500 company Genuine Parts plans to split in two
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Co., the Atlanta-based parent of NAPA Auto Parts, announced its plan to spin off its automotive and industrial parts divisions into two separate public companies. The company believes this split will create more agile businesses better positioned for growth and new investments, with tailored strategies for their respective customers and market needs. With a market value exceeding $20 billion, the split is expected to be completed by 2027, requiring shareholder approval.

feed.title: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) Reaches New 12-Month Low Following Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) recently hit a new 52-week low after Wells Fargo & Company downgraded its price target and issued an "underweight" rating. The stock traded as low as $189.16 following several analyst downgrades, despite the company reporting better-than-expected quarterly earnings and authorizing a $600 million share buyback. Insiders, however, sold significant portions of their holdings, with two directors reducing their ownership by over 70%.

feed.title: How Ford's 'skunkworks' team is designing a more efficient EV
feed.summary: Ford's "skunkworks" team developed a new Universal EV Platform, launching next year with a midsize pickup starting at $30,000. This platform boasts 20% fewer parts, 50 miles of extended range from aerodynamic improvements, and advanced internet-connected technology. The initiative represents a significant cultural shift in Ford's vehicle development, focusing on agility, innovation, and cross-functional collaboration to compete with Tesla and Chinese EV manufacturers.

feed.title: Enphase launches software-based export management
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has launched new Power Control software for its IQ9 and IQ8 microinverter-based commercial solar systems. This software enables installers to configure aggregate export limits, which simplifies permitting and reduces costs associated with utility upgrades. The solution supports non-export and limited-export installations, leveraging software-defined export management to minimize the need for transformer upgrades or third-party hardware.

feed.title: Krystal Biotech Surpasses Expectations as VYJUVEK Drives Record 2025 Revenue and International Expansion
feed.summary: Krystal Biotech (NASDAQ: KRYS) reported record financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, driven by the strong commercial uptake and international expansion of its gene therapy, VYJUVEK. The company achieved substantial increases in revenue and net income, alongside maintaining high gross margins. Krystal Biotech also highlighted significant progress in its clinical pipeline with RMAT designation for KB707 and Fast Track Designation for KB111, positioning itself for continued growth and global market penetration in 2026.

feed.title: Nicolet Bankshares stock hits all-time high at 158.37 USD
feed.summary: Nicolet Bankshares Inc. (NIC) has reached an all-time high of $158.37, surpassing its 52-week high, driven by strong investor confidence and a 32.28% 1-year total return. The stock is considered undervalued per InvestingPro data and the company has consistently raised its dividend. Recent positive developments include strong Q4 operating earnings, raised price targets from analysts, and a maintained dividend program.

feed.title: Dabur appoints Hershey’s Herjit Bhalla as India chief; elevates Mohit Malhotra to global role
feed.summary: Dabur India has named Herjit Bhalla, formerly of Hershey Company, as its new India chief executive, effective April 15. The current India chief, Mohit Malhotra, will be elevated to the global CEO role. This leadership change is part of a broader trend of executive shifts seen across the consumer goods sector in the past year.

feed.title: DTE nears deal to serve second major Michigan data center, with more in line
feed.summary: DTE Energy, Michigan's largest electric utility, is close to finalizing a deal to power another significant data center, following a "hyperscale" project for OpenAI and Oracle already under construction. This new agreement is part of a larger pipeline of data center demands, totaling 3 to 4 gigawatts, which presents a financial opportunity for utilities but also raises concerns among communities about increased power bills and environmental impact. DTE maintains that new contracts will ensure existing customers are not burdened with costs, and the utility is preparing for infrastructure updates, including potential new power plants and grid-sized batteries, to meet this growing demand.

feed.title: Blackstone to acquire home services company Champions Group (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone (BX) has agreed to acquire Champions Group, a home services provider, from Odyssey Investment Partners. Odyssey and Champions' management will retain a significant minority investment in the company. Financial terms of the transaction were not disclosed.

feed.title: Amgen’s Uplizna now approved in EU to treat most adults with gMG
feed.summary: Amgen's Uplizna, an infusion therapy for generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) patients positive for AChR or MuSK antibodies, has received approval for use in the European Union. This approval is significant as it provides a new treatment option that targets CD19-positive B cells, potentially reducing the long-term reliance on corticosteroids. Clinical trials for Uplizna demonstrated its efficacy in improving daily living activities and reducing muscle weakness in gMG patients with twice-yearly dosing.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Sells Procter & Gamble Company (The) (NYSE:PG) Shares
feed.summary: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. disclosed selling between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) shares on January 30th, while also purchasing stakes in several other companies like Hermès, Tencent, and Costco around the same time. Procter & Gamble recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates with $1.88 EPS, and announced a quarterly dividend. Analyst ratings are generally positive for PG, with an average "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: PJM board approves $11.8B transmission expansion plan
feed.summary: PJM Interconnection's board has approved an $11.8 billion transmission expansion plan, with Dominion Energy's Virginia utility securing $4.8 billion of those projects. The plan aims to enhance grid reliability due to accelerated load growth, particularly from data centers, and integrate new generation, addressing increasing transmission costs that contributed significantly to wholesale electricity prices in 2024. Key projects include a $2.3-billion underground transmission line in Virginia and a $1.7-billion line in Pennsylvania.

feed.title: HP Inc (HPQ) Trading Down 3.12% on Feb 17
feed.summary: Shares of HP Inc (HPQ) fell 3.12% to $18.66 on February 17, placing the stock 47.10% below its 52-week high and 2.19% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts have an average one-year target price of $24.08, implying a 29.06% upside, and a "Hold" recommendation, while GuruFocus estimates the fair value at $31.35, suggesting a 68.01% upside. This stock alert was generated by automated technology from GuruFocus financial data.

feed.title: DTE Energy’s 5-year spending plan jumps 20% on data center, reliability investments
feed.summary: DTE Energy has increased its five-year investment plan for 2026-2030 by 20% to $36.5 billion, primarily due to rising data center demand and necessary reliability upgrades. The company secured a significant hyperscale data center contract with Oracle for 1.4 GW and is in advanced discussions for an additional 3 GW. This increased spending will also fund energy storage, renewable energy installations, and grid improvements to enhance service reliability.

feed.title: Why Gartner keeps ranking Salesforce's Informatica a data quality Leader
feed.summary: Informatica, a Salesforce company specializing in AI-powered cloud data management, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Augmented Data Quality Solutions for the 18th consecutive time. This acknowledgment highlights Informatica's "Ability to Execute" and "Completeness of Vision" for its Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC) platform. The IDMC platform, powered by the CLAIRE AI engine, provides comprehensive data quality capabilities crucial for leveraging modern AI and analytics across diverse hybrid and multi-cloud environments.

feed.title: Expanse Studios Launches First Celebrity-Branded Slot ‘VASO Psycho’ with MMA Icon Vaso Bakocevic
feed.summary: Expanse Studios, a Golden Matrix Group subsidiary, has launched VASO Psycho, its first celebrity-branded slot game, in partnership with MMA fighter Vaso "Psycho" Bakocevic. This new title aims to leverage Bakocevic's substantial regional online following to expand market reach and generate a new revenue stream through celebrity IP. The game features MMA-themed mechanics, a high RTP, and a maximum multiplier of 10,000x, with a full global rollout expected by the end of February.

feed.title: First Solar (FSLR) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR) is expected to report increased earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ending December 2025, with an earnings report anticipated on February 24. Despite the positive consensus, the Zacks Earnings ESP suggests analysts have become slightly more bearish, resulting in a -1.65% ESP. Combined with a Zacks Rank #3, this makes a definitive prediction of an earnings beat difficult for First Solar.

feed.title: Teledyne RDI ADCPs to support Japan's deep-sea EIA of Polymetallic Nodule Mining
feed.summary: Teledyne RD Instruments has been selected by Deep Reach Technology to provide 20 advanced Acoustic Doppler Current Profilers (ADCPs) for a deep-sea environmental impact assessment (EIA) of polymetallic nodule mining in Japan's Exclusive Economic Zone. These ADCPs will capture crucial data on current direction, turbulence, and sediment plume transport to ensure responsible resource development and meet international regulatory requirements for pre-mining data collection. The project highlights Teledyne RDI's long-standing collaboration with companies like CSA Ocean Sciences and Kiva Marine in providing reliable deepwater monitoring solutions.

feed.title: Pan American Silver Set to Announce Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Pan American Silver (PAAS) is scheduled to announce its Q4 earnings on February 18, with Wall Street anticipating a significant year-over-year increase in EPS to $0.89 and revenue of $1.12 billion. The company achieved a record silver production of 7.3 million ounces in Q4 and expects continued growth, contributing to a positive long-term outlook despite short-term market fluctuations for precious metals. Analysts have raised price targets for PAAS, citing increased gold and copper price forecasts and strong demand drivers.

feed.title: Moody's Corp. (MCO) call put ratio 1 call to 2.8 puts into quarter results
feed.summary: Moody's Corp. (MCO) is showing a call-put ratio of 1 call to 2.8 puts as it approaches its quarter results release on February 18. The implied volatility for its February call options is at 90, and for March options, it's at 42, reflecting a notable increase compared to its 52-week range of 18 to 49. The company's stock shows an overall analyst rating of "SELL" with a current price of $424.05, a slight decrease of 0.56%.

feed.title: Krystal Biotech slips more than 2% even after Q4 earnings and revenue top estimates
feed.summary: Krystal Biotech (KRYS) saw its stock slip over 2% despite reporting better-than-expected Q4 earnings and revenue. The biotechnology company announced an EPS of $0.05, significantly beating analyst estimates of a $0.94 loss, and revenue of $16.14 million, which also surpassed expectations. This positive financial performance indicates strong growth for the company, even if the market reacted negatively.

feed.title: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Allots 12,665 Equity Shares Under Employee Stock Option Schemes
feed.summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has allotted 12,665 equity shares to employees under its 2002 and 2007 stock option schemes. These shares, exercised at various price points up to Rs. 735.80 per share, are fully paid-up and immediately tradeable. The allotment increases the company's total issued shares to 83,46,44,020, impacting the share capital accordingly.

feed.title: Truist Financial Issues Positive Forecast for First American Financial (NYSE:FAF) Stock Price
feed.summary: Truist Financial has increased its price target for First American Financial (NYSE:FAF) from $76 to $82, maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 21.3% upside. This follows a strong quarter where First American Financial exceeded analyst expectations with EPS of $1.99 and $2.0 billion in revenue. The company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with institutional investors owning approximately 89% of the stock.

feed.title: General Mills slides 6.84% after cutting fiscal 2026 sales and profit outlook
feed.summary: General Mills (GIS) stock dropped 6.84% after the company lowered its fiscal 2026 sales and profit outlook. This cut reflects weaker demand, increased consumer uncertainty, and a slower-than-expected volume recovery. The revised guidance suggests a larger earnings decline than previously anticipated by investors.
